description: Static entry point for browsing generated LocalAI worker-mode benchmark cycle reports.

presentation.title: LocalAI Worker-Mode Benchmark Results
presentation.subtitle: Cycle-level benchmark reports across fixed-cluster and provider-backed executions
presentation.overview: This page provides a compact entry point for reviewing benchmark reports across the available execution cycles. Each cycle is presented independently so that latency, throughput, resource pressure, placement, infrastructure size, latency injection, and multi-tenancy evidence can be interpreted within its own context.
presentation.methodologicalNote: Cross-cycle comparisons must account for the cross-cycle baseline, family-local reference scenarios, provider, and infrastructure profile documented in each cycle report. Scenario entries and unsupported entries summarize the available evidence and must be interpreted together with the corresponding cycle-level report.
presentation.emptyStateMessage: No cycle-level report is currently available. The page is still generated as a stable entry point and will expose reports as soon as they are produced.
